name: Rubber Dock Bumper
shortDescription: Solid rubber bumper range for dock walls, columns and bay entry points.
longDescription: Solid rubber dock bumpers bolted onto dock walls, columns and bay entry points to absorb everyday contact from reversing vehicles. Supplied across four sizes so the bumper can be matched to the vehicle weight class and impact frequency of a given bay.

images.alt: Rubber Dock Bumper supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
